profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Toba Pulp Lestari Tbk produces and sells pulp and its products in Indonesia and internationally. The company manages industrial forest plantations. The company was formerly known as PT Inti Indorayon Utama Tbk and changed its name to PT Toba Pulp Lestari Tbk in August 2001. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Medan, Indonesia. As of June 12, 2025, PT Toba Pulp Lestari Tbk operates as a subsidiary of Allied Hill Enterprise Ltd.
profil.berita_terkini: ⚠️ Laporan keuangan dalam USD, harga dalam IDR. Rasio (ROE/ROA/margin) tetap valid, tetapi valuasi per-saham (EPS/PER/PBV/DCF) tidak akurat tanpa konversi kurs.
